mapper.sql: TR_SNO, MEMBER_NO, TR_DT, TR_GB_CD, TR_METHOD_GB_CD, TR_DY, ORG_NO, BRCH_NO, TR_PT, BEF_PT, AFR_PT, PURCHASE_AMT, ORGL_TR_SNO, REG_USER_ID, REG_DT, LAST_MOD_USER_ID, LAST_MOD_DT
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from t_tr_hist
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into t_tr_hist (TR_SNO, MEMBER_NO, TR_DT, TR_GB_CD, TR_METHOD_GB_CD, TR_DY, ORG_NO, BRCH_NO, TR_PT, BEF_PT, AFR_PT, PURCHASE_AMT, ORGL_TR_SNO, REG_USER_ID, REG_DT, LAST_MOD_USER_ID, LAST_MOD_DT) values (#{trSno,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{memberNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{trDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{trGbCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{trMethodGbCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{trDy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orgNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{brchNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{trPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{befPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{afrPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{purchaseAmt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{orglTrSno,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into t_tr_hist
TR_SNO,
MEMBER_NO,
TR_DT,
TR_GB_CD,
TR_METHOD_GB_CD,
TR_DY,
ORG_NO,
BRCH_NO,
TR_PT,
BEF_PT,
AFR_PT,
PURCHASE_AMT,
ORGL_TR_SNO,
REG_USER_ID,
REG_DT,
LAST_MOD_USER_ID,
LAST_MOD_DT,
#{trSno,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{memberNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{trDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{trGbCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{trMethodGbCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{trDy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{orgNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{brchNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{trPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{befPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{afrPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{purchaseAmt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{orglTrSno,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update t_tr_hist
TR_SNO = #{row.trSno,jdbcType=BIGINT},
MEMBER_NO = #{row.memberNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
TR_DT = #{row.trDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
TR_GB_CD = #{row.trGbCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TR_METHOD_GB_CD = #{row.trMethodGbCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TR_DY = #{row.trDy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ORG_NO = #{row.orgNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
BRCH_NO = #{row.brchNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
TR_PT = #{row.trPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
BEF_PT = #{row.befPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
AFR_PT = #{row.afrPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
PURCHASE_AMT = #{row.purchaseAmt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
ORGL_TR_SNO = #{row.orglTrSno,jdbcType=BIGINT},
REG_USER_ID = #{row.regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
REG_DT = #{row.regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
LAST_MOD_USER_ID = #{row.lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
LAST_MOD_DT = #{row.lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},

update t_tr_hist set TR_SNO = #{row.trSno,jdbcType=BIGINT}, MEMBER_NO = #{row.memberNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, TR_DT = #{row.trDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, TR_GB_CD = #{row.trGbCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TR_METHOD_GB_CD = #{row.trMethodGbCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TR_DY = #{row.trDy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ORG_NO = #{row.orgNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, BRCH_NO = #{row.brchNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, TR_PT = #{row.trPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, BEF_PT = #{row.befPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, AFR_PT = #{row.afrPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, PURCHASE_AMT = #{row.purchaseAmt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, ORGL_TR_SNO = #{row.orglTrSno,jdbcType=BIGINT}, REG_USER_ID = #{row.regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REG_DT = #{row.regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, LAST_MOD_USER_ID = #{row.lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAST_MOD_DT = #{row.lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}

update t_tr_hist
MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
TR_DT = #{trDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
TR_GB_CD = #{trGbCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TR_METHOD_GB_CD = #{trMethodGbCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TR_DY = #{trDy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ORG_NO = #{orgNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
BRCH_NO = #{brchNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
TR_PT = #{trPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
BEF_PT = #{befPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
AFR_PT = #{afrPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
PURCHASE_AMT = #{purchaseAmt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
ORGL_TR_SNO = #{orglTrSno,jdbcType=BIGINT},
REG_USER_ID = #{regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
REG_DT = #{regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
LAST_MOD_USER_ID = #{lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
LAST_MOD_DT = #{lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where TR_SNO = #{trSno,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update t_tr_hist set MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, TR_DT = #{trDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, TR_GB_CD = #{trGbCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TR_METHOD_GB_CD = #{trMethodGbCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TR_DY = #{trDy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ORG_NO = #{orgNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, BRCH_NO = #{brchNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, TR_PT = #{trPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, BEF_PT = #{befPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, AFR_PT = #{afrPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, PURCHASE_AMT = #{purchaseAmt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, ORGL_TR_SNO = #{orglTrSno,jdbcType=BIGINT}, REG_USER_ID = #{regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REG_DT = #{regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, LAST_MOD_USER_ID = #{lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAST_MOD_DT = #{lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where TR_SNO = #{trSno,jdbcType=BIGINT}
